problem: Traditional blood glucose monitoring requires frequent fingersticks and provides only intermittent snapshots, making it difficult for patients and clinicians to understand glucose patterns and trends.
solution: Dexcom develops continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) systems including the G6, G7, and ONE+ sensors that provide real-time glucose readings every few minutes without fingersticks. The platform integrates with insulin pumps, smartphones, and clinic software to enable data-driven diabetes management and remote monitoring by healthcare providers.
